sourceSummary.oneLine: Part approval sheet for BLUE_1417_CARBON_PLATE, part no. MKK-100103, covering revision history, material list, QC process flow, and inspection controls.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supplier approval documentation for customer ㈜H&abyz and supplier ㈜ 한일산업.
keyPoints: Applies to models G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, and G1417FWP.
Revision 01 dated 2025.10.15 records a shape change.
Raw material list identifies USN250 prepreg from Toray.
QC process flow is marked for mass production and SOP control plan category.
Inspection controls include incoming material checks, external machining, shipment inspection, dimensional inspection, weight inspection, and packaging.
